headline: S&P Unveils Blockchain Index For 20 Digital Assets

article.title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
article.summary: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.

headline: $1M Crypto PAC Boosts Michigan Dem Primary

article.title: Crypto PAC pours $1M into Michigan Democratic primary race
article.summary: Donavan McKinney, running against Michigan incumbent Shri Thanedar, said that “the crypto lobby is paying my opponent back for helping Trump“ with the PAC-funded ads.

headline: Southwest Cuts Guidance Amid 10% Fuel Cost Surge

article.title: Southwest Hedges Full-Year Guidance as Fuel Expenses Tick Up
article.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. broadened its guidance for full-year 2026 to account for uncertainty resulting from the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran, which sent fuel expenses higher in the second quarter.

headline: Mexico's Casa de Tono Weighs $500M Sale

article.title: Mexico City Pozole Chain Casa de Tono Explores Sale on Expansion Pitch
article.summary: Mexican family-owned restaurant chain La Casa de Toño is seeking a sale in a deal that could top $400 million and set the business up for expansion, people familiar with the matter said.

article.title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
article.summary: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

headline: Kraken Expands xStocks Offerings to 500 Global Markets

article.title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
article.summary: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

headline: Circle Faces 20% Downside Risk: Mizuho Alert

article.title: Clarity Act’s impact on Circle could be negative over the long term, Mizuho says
article.summary: On Wednesday, the Clarity Act took one step closer to becoming law as Republicans released the latest text for the legislation.

headline: Hut 8 Target Raised 18% Amid REIT Pivot

article.title: Benchmark sees Hut 8 becoming a ‘power-first data center REIT,’ raises target another 18%
article.summary: Benchmark’s new price target implies roughly 75% upside, with Hut 8 shares already up nearly 120% year to date.

headline: Google Burns $6bn in Q2 Amid AI Push

article.title: Google reports $6bn cash burn last quarter as it raises AI spending again
article.summary: Search giant says it will commit up to $205bn on AI investments in 2026

headline: Tesla Profits Drop 30% on EV Discounts

article.title: Tesla profits plunge as discounts on EV models weigh on results
article.summary: Capital expenditures more than doubled as company accelerates pivot to semiconductors, autonomous taxis and humanoid robots
